last_training_run.name: full-stack
last_training_run.notes: Policy collapses at ~ep100 to fixed behavior (return=-0.866, 103 steps, 0 food). Early eps fine. Full architecture may interfere with learning.

known_issues: BLOCKING: Full stack policy collapse after ~100 eps — agent converges to degenerate fixed policy
Likely cause: metacognition confidence scaling and/or workspace broadcast interfere with gradient signal
Need to investigate: disable metacognition and workspace individually to find culprit
next_actions: Diagnose policy collapse: run with --no-workspace and with metacognition disabled individually
Fix the stability issue before proceeding to Stage 7
Plan Stage 7 after stability is restored

completed_stages.6: Metacognition — implemented, stability issue under investigation
